key_items: Bitcoin funding rates turn positive with price holding $80K; analysts target $85K rally
CLARITY Act markup scheduled for Thursday with strongest crypto industry confidence in months despite banking lobby resistance
Strong ETF inflows surge (Circle +15%, Solana ETF strongest since February) indicating institutional capital rotation into crypto
reasoning: Multiple bullish technical and macro catalysts converge this week: positive funding rates at key support levels, surging spot ETF inflows from institutions, and the most significant regulatory breakthrough (CLARITY Act) in months despite banking opposition. Macro backdrop supports risk-on positioning with inflation data and geopolitical tensions creating traditional market volatility that historically benefits Bitcoin as uncorrelated asset.
risks: CLARITY Act vote could fail if Democrat resistance holds, and major macro collision this week (Fed chair, CPI, US-Iran tensions) could trigger broad risk-off selling that overwhelms crypto-specific bullish catalysts.
